sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45582" key="e)faimorrage/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐφαιμορρᾰγέω</orth>, <sense id="n45582.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">have secondary haemorrhage</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:50:52:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50.52.1</biblScope> </bibl>:—also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐωχ-αιμορροέω</orth>, Id.ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:50:51:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">50.51.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
